creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
irc/weechat-devel hasn't been undated since Feb 2014.

In constrast, the stable version of weechat has been updated twice with releases since this.

Since weechat-devel isn't doing what it was created to do (track weechat before the release), can it be removed?  In generate, -devel should never be older than stable.  At the version least, IGNORE should be set in these cases (where they are only temporarily equal, but soon after -devel should be newer again).
